basic_details.job_title: CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT)
basic_details.department: Prof. N. R. Madhava Menon Interdisciplinary Centre for Research Ethics and Protocols (ICREP)
basic_details.total_vacancies: 01 (Computer Science) + arising vacancies during rank list validity
basic_details.short_information: The Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has officially announced the Assistant Professor (on Contract) Recruitment 2026 with 01 vacancy (Computer Science) plus any arising vacancies during the validity of the rank list. The detailed notification was published on 29 June 2026 at the official website of CUSAT. Candidates who meet the prescribed eligibility criteria (no age limit specified) and hold B.E./B.Tech./B.S. and M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or Integrated M.Tech. in Computer Science, or MCA with First Class/equivalent, or M.Sc. in Computer Science with NET/Ph.D. can submit their onli

application_fee.details: General Candidates: Rs. 950/- SC/ST Candidates: Rs. 195/- | Mode of Payment: Online (Net Banking / Credit / Debit Card)

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: | B.E/B.Tech/B.S. and M.E/M.Tech/M.S. or Integrated M.Tech in Computer Science OR MCA with first class or equivalent. OR M.Sc. Computer Science with NET/Ph.D. | Desirable Qualification: Ph.D.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates shall apply online through the website recruit.cusat.ac.in before the last date.

The hard copy of the online application as downloaded from the website, strictly adhering to the terms/regulations mentioned in the Notification should reach the Office of the Registrar before the last date prescribed along with the self attested copies of necessary documents in proof of all claims made in the application such as Qualification, Date of Birth, Reservation etc.
important_instructions: Applications received after the last date will be summarily rejected. Application fee is non-refundable. Communal reservation policy will be followed.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has released Notification No. Ad.D2/ICREP/2024 dated 29.06.2026 for appointment of Assistant Professor (on Contract) in the Prof. N. R. Madhava Menon Interdisciplinary Centre for Research Ethics and Protocols (ICREP). Download CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date for Receiving Hard Copy

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: B.E/B.Tech/B.S. and M.E/M.Tech/M.S. or Integrated M.Tech in Computer Science OR MCA with first class or equivalent. OR M.Sc. Computer Science with NET/Ph.D. Desirable Qualification: Ph.D.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: General Candidates: Rs. 950/- SC/ST Candidates: Rs. 195/- Mode of Payment: Online (Net Banking / Credit / Debit Card)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Interested candidates shall apply online through the website recruit.cusat.ac.in before the last date. The hard copy of the online application as downloaded from the website, strictly adhering to the terms/regulations mentioned in the Notification should reach the Office of the Registrar before the last date prescribed along with the self attested copies of necessary documents in proof of all claims made in the application such as Qualification, Date of Birth, Reservation etc.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions:
content_sections.text: Applications received after the last date will be summarily rejected. Application fee is non-refundable. Communal reservation policy will be followed.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CUSAT Assistant Professor 2026?
faq.answer: Last date for online application is 20 July 2026 and hard copy must reach by 27 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Assistant Professor (on Contract) at CUSAT?
faq.answer: Rs. 47,000/- per month for Ph.D. holders and Rs. 45,000/- per month for others.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for CUSAT Assistant Professor in ICREP?
faq.answer: 01 vacancy in Computer Science (plus any arising vacancies during the rank list period).

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for CUSAT Assistant Professor (Computer Science)?
faq.answer: B.Tech + M.Tech/MCA with first class OR M.Sc. Computer Science with NET/Ph.D.

faq.question: Q5. Is Ph.D. mandatory for CUSAT Assistant Professor on Contract?
faq.answer: Ph.D. is desirable. Candidates without Ph.D. can also apply.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Apply online at recruit.cusat.ac.in and send the hard copy of the application with documents to The Registrar, CUSAT.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General category in CUSAT recruitment?
faq.answer: Rs. 950/- for General and Rs. 195/- for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the period of appointment for CUSAT Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Initially one year, with break during May-June vacation months.

faq.question: Q9. Where to submit the hard copy of CUSAT Assistant Professor application?
faq.answer: The Registrar, Cochin University of Science and Technology, Kochi – 682 022.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age limit mentioned for CUSAT Assistant Professor on Contract?
faq.answer: No age limit is mentioned in the official notification.
